best_case.name: Best Case — Honest Customers
best_case.description: Most customers are honest. Abuse stays low. Auto-refunds improve satisfaction and reduce costs.

expected.name: Expected — Mixed Behavior
expected.description: Some customers exploit the system. Abuse grows moderately. Trust erodes if abuse is not controlled.

worst_case.name: Worst Case — Abuse Spikes
worst_case.description: Word spreads that refunds are easy. Abuse grows rapidly. Trust collapses. Revenue hemorrhages.

abuse_growth_factor.label: Abuse Growth Factor
abuse_growth_factor.description: How fast abuse rate multiplies each step when auto-refunds are active.

trust_recovery_rate.label: Trust Recovery Rate
trust_recovery_rate.description: How much trust recovers per step when abuse is low.

satisfaction_boost.label: Satisfaction Boost
satisfaction_boost.description: Points of satisfaction gained from fast auto-refunds.

refund_growth_factor.label: Refund Volume Growth
refund_growth_factor.description: How fast refund requests grow when auto-refunds are easy.

margin_erosion_factor.label: Margin Erosion Factor
margin_erosion_factor.description: Revenue margin multiplier per step from refund costs.

escalation_from_distrust.label: Escalation from Distrust
escalation_from_distrust.description: Escalation rate increase when trust drops below threshold.

abuse_trigger_threshold.label: Abuse Trigger Threshold
abuse_trigger_threshold.description: Abuse rate at which cascading effects begin.

trust_erosion_threshold.label: Trust Erosion Threshold
trust_erosion_threshold.description: Abuse rate at which trust starts declining.

cascade_threshold.label: Cascade Threshold
cascade_threshold.description: Abuse rate at which compounding failures begin.

revenue_collapse_threshold.label: Revenue Collapse Threshold
revenue_collapse_threshold.description: Refund rate at which revenue margin degrades rapidly.
